programme.title: The Jungle Bunch To The Rescue!
programme.desc: The jungle can be a dangerous place... but thankfully there are a group of heroes ready to defend those in trouble. Join the Jungle Bunch as they rush to the rescue of their animal friends!

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.sub-title: How To Succeed In Evil Without Really Trying
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Gus the Itsy Bitsy Knight
programme.desc: Astride his electric pony, wielding a laser sword, little Gus is out to prove that a brave heart can overcome anything.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Can Ash redeem himself?

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Brax and Ricky face a difficult decision. Mali and Abigail have a heart-to-heart. Cash faces serious consequences.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Each week, five groups of bonza, ripper, fair dinkum Aussies become travel critics as they head on the same week-long holiday. This week's destination - Oman!

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Marge And Homer Turn A Couple Play
programme.desc: Homer and Marge play marriage counsellors to help a baseball player and his recording artist-wife.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon gets in trouble with Amy, and it's up to Penny to teach him how to be a better boyfriend. Meanwhile, Howard, must come to grips with Bernadette's dislike of children.

programme.title: St. Denis Medical
programme.desc: Joyce launches a women's health initiative to unexpected results; Ron treats a patient who has all the answers; Bruce has an existential crisis.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Casey is bitterly disappointed. John is forced to own up. Sonny struggles with intimacy.

programme.title: Movie: Maid In Manhattan
programme.desc: Jennifer Lopez stars in this classic romantic comedy as a maid who, after being mistaken for a high-class socialite, is drawn into the world of a rich politician (Ralph Fiennes)..

programme.title: Australian Survivor: Redemption
programme.desc: It's wet, wild and windy in Samoa as the final six players battle it out for the title of sole Survivor, and $500,000.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Nick, Greg and Hodges take Henry to celebrate his birthday at a biker bar, they uncover a double homicide and find several suspects still at the bar who may be the murderers.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: The New Amsterdam team goes out for a night of karaoke and drinking, but must face the consequences at work the next day.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah ensures everything and everyone is at their best for her roast.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: After a romantic 24hrs with their first solo date, the farmers' love bubbles burst with the arrival of their remaining partners, and each farmer must already make some tough decisions.

programme.title: TVNZ2 Returns At 5am
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri And Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou want to meet Dalvanius, who is very good at camouflage. He says he’ll only reveal himself if they promise not to laugh at his ears.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Featuring Anika Moa and her music, educating and entertaining kids through play, movement and dance.

programme.title: The Jungle Bunch To The Rescue!
programme.desc: The jungle can be a dangerous place... but thankfully there are a group of heroes ready to defend those in trouble. Join the Jungle Bunch as they rush to the rescue of their animal friends!

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Gus the Itsy Bitsy Knight
programme.desc: Astride his electric pony, wielding a laser sword, little Gus is out to prove that a brave heart can overcome anything.

The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Casey is bitterly disappointed. John is forced to own up. Sonny struggles with intimacy.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: In this episode, the Travel Guides check out Northern Territory, Australia. Starting in Darwin, they have a terrifying encounter with saltwater crocodiles, then head to Nitmiluk National Park.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Mook, The Chef, The Wife, And Her Homer
programme.desc: Lisa befriends the son of mobster Fat Tony, whose dream is to become a chef; Homer and Bart take over the 'family business' after Fat Tony is gunned down.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny experiment with dating again by 'beta testing' their relationship, while Raj develops a peculiar relationship with his phone's virtual assistant.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Sam and the ghosts face "The Others," a new group of spirits from one ghost's past; Trevor tries to deal with a demanding Patience, who seeks a committed relationship.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John grows suspicious. Brax’s grand plan stalls. Great news is afoot for Sonny.

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by actors Ralph Fiennes, Anna Faris, Olivia Cooke and comedian Michelle de Swarte.

programme.title: The Miniature Wife
programme.sub-title: What Category Is Shrinking Your Wife
programme.desc: While Les comes up with ways to test his regrowth formula, his colleague has other plans to rescue Lindy.

programme.title: Never Mind The Buzzcocks
programme.desc: Gregory Porter, Amy Gledhill and Chesney Hawkes join the regulars for the legendary pop culture panel show's revival, hosted by Greg Davies.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The remaining chefs compete in a speed breakfast challenge; in the most dramatic dinner service yet, both the Red and Blue teams melt under pressure at the fish and meat stations.

programme.title: Stumble
programme.desc: Courteney makes a deal with the Button Factory owner that if her team performs a dazzling routine, he’ll write her department a big check.

programme.title: Laid
programme.desc: Ruby makes a mistake and questions past relationships when she and AJ attend an ex's wedding.

programme.title: The Fortune Hotel
programme.desc: Season Finale: The final Hotel Game sees guests scramble to solve a devious puzzle in their rooms. Then the final 3 pairs race across the Caribbean Sea in the most spectacular Day Trip Challenge yet.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined in the studio by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us a nation.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: On the second night of auditions, seven new performers make their debut. They bring unique talents to the stage in the hopes of capturing the attention of the superstar coaches and moving on.

programme.title: TVNZ2 Returns At 6am
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Kiri And Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.
